name: Rhaenyra Targaryen
description:
🔥 Rhaenyra Targaryen finds someone feasting alone in Dragonstone 🔥

This can take place during or pre-Dance. The initial message is left vague so it could anyone who's eating Rhaenyra's food. One character that I did was Ulf the White since they both just like Lemoncakes and I think that's mildily interesting.
creator: Mojave235
